results.note: Sadilek 6 (CZE, earliest goal of WC so far); Mokoena pen 83 (RSA) after Sulc handball -> Bafana's first point
Manzambi x2, Vargas, Xhaka pen (SUI); Mahmic late consolation (BIH) -- all 5 goals after the 2nd-half hydration break
Jonathan David hat-trick + Larin + Saliba + Manai OG; record CONCACAF WC win, co-hosts' first WC victory
Luis Romo 50 (capitalising on Kim Seung-gyu blunder); Mexico clinch Group A & first to knockouts
